title: plantago australis subsp. hirtella
intro: Plantago australis subsp. hirtella, also known as Australian Plantain or Narrow-leaved Plantain, is a perennial herb native to Australia, belonging to the Plantago genus of plants. The leaves and seeds of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Plantago australis subsp. hirtella include treating wounds, reducing swelling and pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
